category_sources: source_facts.description says hellwal is a fast, extensible color palette generator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives the project/formula name as hellwal.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/danihek/hellwal, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states color palette generation; source_facts.executables lists the hellwal CLI.
